title: llm_providers
description: Tier 1 SOT — API credentials per key. FROZEN from system mutation (only admin/Bos can add/delete records). Each (provider, account_email) tuple is a separate record; multiple records per provider is allowed by design (parallel keys for capacity). NOT a duplicate-detection target.

account_email.description: Account identifier — email, 'owner', or 'email/key_type' for openrouter

api_key.description: Actual API key (masked in some contexts)

key_purpose.description:
Role of this key. SINGLE-PURPOSE providers use one key for everything. MULTI-PURPOSE providers (notably openrouter) have separate keys for different surfaces:
- 'inference' — call/invoke models
- 'provisioning' — listing/management/admin
- 'primary' / 'secondary' / 'experimental' — paralel keys for capacity
Misusing the wrong key on the wrong surface yields auth failure or wrong data.

_migration_note_2026_06_19: llm_providers schema was simplified from a 23-field configuration blob to a 9-field credential store. Pre-migration fields (auth_format, base_url, free_tier, endpoints, payload_format, etc.) are now consolidated in providers collection (Tier 2) and should no longer be stored here.
